name: count_tokens
description: Count the number of tokens in a message payload without sending it to the model. Useful for estimating costs, managing context window limits, and pre-validating request sizes.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID to use for tokenization.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects to count tokens for.

parameters.name: system
parameters.description: System prompt to include in the token count.

parameters.name: tools
parameters.description: Tool definitions to include in the token count.
